expectations.text: the assistant accepts the MTLS manifest and proceeds through generation rather than refusing it as an unsupported auth mode
expectations.evidence: OLD skill (pre-MTLS) refuses at Precondition 2 by design: it hard-fails on cluster.auth values other than SASL_SCRAM. This is the baseline behavior the new skill is meant to improve on. The agent's refusal message correctly cites issue #64 and writes no files.
no skill files generated under /tmp/skill-out-eval1-old/ — refusal happened first
no _common.sh generated (vacuously not-applicable, marked false to keep the comparison honest)

expectations.text: /tmp/skill-out-eval1-new/scripts/_common.sh's validate_context_env requires the cert env vars when TLS_ENABLED is set without SASL_ENABLED
/tmp/skill-out-eval1-new/scripts/_common.sh defines a build_cert_mount_args helper and the wrappers splice MOUNT_ARGS into their docker run line
/tmp/skill-out-eval1-new/scripts/.env.example documents CONTEXTS_DEV_TLS_CERT/CERTKEY/CA and not SASL_USERNAME/PASSWORD for the dev context
if Step 5's smoke test fails (broker unreachable), the assistant surfaces the failure rather than claiming success
expectations.evidence: smoke test was never reached — the refusal happened at Precondition 2, before Step 1 ran
